settings.name: sync
settings.label: Sync products
settings.help: Loads the Shopify frontpage collection, creates missing CMS products, and fully refreshes products that changed on Shopify. Stops after about 50 seconds — click Sync again to continue.

settings.name: purge
settings.label: Purge products
settings.help: Deletes local products whose Shopify ID no longer exists on Shopify (and related images). Oldest products first. Stops after about 50 seconds — click Purge again to continue.

settings.name: thumb_html_ttl
settings.label: Thumb HTML cache (seconds)
settings.help: How long product thumbnail HTML/payload may be reused without rebuild (default 900 = 15 minutes)

settings.name: shopify_data_ttl
settings.label: Shopify data recheck (seconds)
settings.help: How long CMS product data is treated as fresh without a full Shopify Admin recheck (default 3600 = 1 hour)

settings.name: product_page_recheck_ttl
settings.label: Product page recheck (seconds)
settings.help: How often a product page may recheck Shopify for price/availability (default 300 = 5 minutes)

settings.name: max_refresh_time
settings.label: Max refresh time per request (seconds)
settings.help: Budget for Shopify Admin API product refreshes in one page request (default 30). When exhausted, serve CMS data without more live API calls
